span.p:
What cross
account discovery
mode is being
used?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Retrieve errors from
CloudFormation console.
NB: the error from the
main stack is insufficent,
retrieve the error from
the first nested stack
failed.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Has the required
CloudFormation been deployed
in the accounts and regions
to be discovered as per the
documention?

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Deploy the global resources
template exacty once in each
account and the regional
template in every region as
documented.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: Are there errors dispalyed in the UI

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Retrieve any browser errors
using the browser dev tools.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Are there resource types
supported by WD
that are missing and that are
known to be deployed in
the target accounts?

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Are there out of memory
errors for the discovery
process running in ECS?
Verify by following
the pre-requisite steps.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Do either the Neptune
or Opensearch DBs
have abnormally high
CPU spikes? Verify by following
the pre-requisite steps.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Retrieve the logs for the
discovery process running
in ECS as per
the documention.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Increase the instance
size of the DBs
through CloudFormation
as per the
the documention.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Increase the memory of
the discovery task
by updating the Memory
parameter in
CloudFormation as per
the documentation.

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Describe the problem you are
seeing and the steps to reproduce.
